content.en:
Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and this Taixuan Realm Dragon continued to kill and fight, and with his powerful Eternal Dao Body and Dao Seed Secret Technique, he forcibly suppressed this Taixuan Realm Dragon.

"No wonder the Lord of the Musical Note Country didn't dare to come and explore here, the strength of this Taixuan Realm Dragon is much stronger than him, he estimated that he was severely injured by this Taixuan Realm Dragon, so he didn't dare to come in again!"

Ye Tian guessed.

And for the Lord of the Music Note Country, even if he sells this place to other powerhouses, it is estimated that he will not be able to sell it at a good price.

This time, he and Ye Tian were able to trade an Eternal National Order, which was undoubtedly the most cost-effective deal.

And Ye Tian was willing to trade, because he also took a fancy to the fact that there might be a treasure similar to the evil vine here, otherwise he would not have bought it.

......

"It's hard to kill this Mysterious Realm Dragon with just a replica body, and this floating realm won't take too long to get out of here, and you have to kill it as soon as possible. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's other replica bodies also rushed over and besieged this Taixuan Realm Dragon together.

Finally.

Under the siege of the three replica bodies, this Taixuan Realm Dragon was finally killed by Ye Tian.

After killing the Taixuan Realm Dragon, Ye Tian put away the body of the Taixuan Realm Dragon, and then began to explore this floating realm.

"There are indeed a lot of resources, put them all away!"

Ye Tian collected the resources here one by one, if there were really no treasures similar to the evil vines, he couldn't lose money!

Soon, he came to the depths of the floating world.

At this time, the aura similar to the demon seed became stronger and stronger, and Ye Tian was also vigilant.

The depths of the Floating Realm.

Ye Tian finally discovered the source of this aura, it was a corpse, and it was also a Taixuan Realm Dragon, but it was many times larger than the Taixuan Realm Dragon he killed, and the aura was too terrifying.

"The Dragon !!!! of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm"

Ye Tian recognized it.

And this Taixuan Realm Dragon is dead, and the cause of death is a piece of wood, as if it has been sharpened wood, piercing the Taixuan Realm Dragon.

"What kind of wood is this?"

Ye Tian couldn't recognize it, and was very curious.

Immediately, one of his replicas stepped forward and touched the piece of wood.

In an instant, a terrifying force spread from this piece of wood, heading straight for his Eternal Dao Seed.

In an instant, his Eternal Dao Seed was absorbed into a force, and the Eternal Dao Seed became weaker and weaker.

Immediately, he rushed out of the log.

"Such a terrifying piece of wood, it can absorb the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, and the speed of absorption is too fast, even I can't hold it for a while. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And this piece of wood should still have the ability to make the Eternal Dao Seed demonized, but his is a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, so it will not be demonized.

But even if it doesn't turn into a demon, it can't stop this piece of wood from absorbing the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, and once it touches it for a while, it will still die.

But there is no doubt that this piece of wood is absolutely extraordinary, it must be very precious, and it may even be above the value of the evil vine.

"I'll have to take the Mirror of Everything and identify it. "

Soon.

A replica of his came in with the Mirror of the Divine Mirror, identifying the piece of wood.

And the identification process is very slow, which shows how powerful this piece of wood is.

It took a long time for it to be identified.

One of the Eternal Devouring Tree Remnants, which can devour the Eternal Dao Seed, accelerate the demonization of the Eternal Dao Seed, and use the Eternal Dao Seed to continuously feed, and can master the Eternal Devouring Tree Remnant Branch......

"The stump of the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree has no effect of assisting cultivation, but if you feed it with the Eternal Dao Seed, you can control it, that is, you can use it as a weapon!" Ye Tian said.

This thing can even be killed by the Taixuan Realm Dragon of the Eternal Realm God Realm, if it is used as a weapon, even if his cultivation is low, he may be able to kill the powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm of half a step!

If he can do it, then this Eternal Realm Devouring Tree Stump will be very valuable, and it can be used as his strongest weapon!

"Take it away first, and then go back and refine it slowly!"

Ye Tian took it into his body, and even if he didn't touch it directly, his Eternal Dao Seed was still absorbed by it little by little.

After that, he scraped this floating realm again, except for the remnants of this eternal realm devouring tree, there were not too many other treasures, but they were also worth the value of an eternal national order, and some more.

If you count the stumps of the Eternal Realm, he will make a lot of money.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian came out of this floating realm.

......

The Endless Realm.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to refine this Eternal Realm Devouring Tree Stump, and he continued to use his Eternal Dao Seed power to pour into the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree Stump, allowing it to continuously absorb his Eternal Dao Seed power.

Gradually, a replica body was scrapped.

He then proceeded to do so with a second replica body.

The years passed.

As the replica body was scrapped, the connection between Ye Tian and the stump of the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree became deeper and deeper.

"I'm about to master this Eternal Devouring Tree Stump!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Another period of time had passed, and this section of the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree Remnant had absorbed too much of his Eternal Dao power, and it was finally completely controlled by him.

Airplanes!!!!

This Eternal Devouring Tree Stump flew into his hand, and he controlled it as he pleased, and could even make this Eternal Devouring Tree Stump change into a thousand things, and finally turned into a spear.

"Just keep this form, and call you the Eternal Devouring Spear!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With this gun, his strength has increased again.

"If I dare to use it, other Eternal Dao realms will not dare to touch it when they see it!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, there may be strong people who can counteract the absorption of the remnants of the Devouring Tree in the Eternal Realm, and keep their Eternal Dao Seed from being sucked away, but they dare to use it.

After controlling it at will, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed would naturally not be absorbed by it.

So, he put this Eternal Realm Devouring Spear into the Eternal (Qian's Zhao) Dao Seed and conceived it.

Subsequently.

He began to think about cultivation.

He had now raised his Eternal Dao Body to the Perfection Realm, cultivated to the peak realm of the Eternal Dao Realm, and the next step was to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

In fact, with his current Eternal Dao Species, he could also impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, but he didn't want to break through now, and he still wanted to accumulate foundation.

After the Eternal Dao Body reaches the Perfection Realm, it needs to improve the Eternal Dao Seed and strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed, and to a certain extent, it can impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

And there is no certain standard for strengthening the Eternal Dao species, if you think it is about the same, you can solidify the Eternal Dao species.

When the Eternal Dao Seed was completely solidified, it broke through to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Why are the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm not afraid of the Demon Seed, it is not that there is no problem with their Eternal Dao Seed, but that the Eternal Dao Seed is solidified, and the Demon Seed aura cannot affect their Eternal Dao Seed, so it will not be transformed by the Demon Seed.
